description: Android Shell and Desktop Shell finalization (Phases 4+5). Ensure Android Activity properly hosts the shared WaitroomScreen with lifecycle handling, and Desktop window is configured at 900x600 with title 'GAIME - AI Waitroom'. Wire state machine to scene activation (scene starts on Thinking, continues in ReadyButPlaying). Prepare always-on-top as a code option in desktop.
steps: Update composeApp/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/aiundb/gaime/MainActivity.kt - ensure proper lifecycle handling: animation should pause/reduce when Activity is paused (use Lifecycle observer or DisposableEffect)
Verify composeApp/src/androidMain/AndroidManifest.xml has proper theme, configChanges for rotation, exported activity

Update composeApp/src/desktopMain/kotlin/main.kt - set window size to DpSize(900.dp, 600.dp), set title to 'GAIME - AI Waitroom', add a commented-out / prepared always-on-top option (window.isAlwaysOnTop property or equivalent)
Create composeApp/src/desktopMain/kotlin/desktop/AlwaysOnTopController.kt - simple object/class that can toggle always-on-top on the window (prepared but not forced active)
Wire the GameStateMachine state changes to SceneEngine: when state enters Thinking, start the current scene animation; when state enters Idle or Closed, stop/reset the scene
Update WaitroomScreen to show kiIsReady indicator (e.g., a banner or icon when KI is ready but game still running)
Ensure the app gracefully handles rapid state transitions without crashes
Final integration test: verify complete flow Idle->Thinking(scene starts)->ReadyButPlaying(scene continues, kiIsReady shown)->GameOver->RevealReady(scene stops) works in code
acceptance_criteria: Running ./gradlew build compiles Android and Desktop targets without errors
Desktop jar can be built with ./gradlew :composeApp:desktopJar
State machine drives scene lifecycle: scene animates during Thinking and ReadyButPlaying, stops on Idle/Closed/RevealReady
WaitroomScreen displays kiIsReady indicator when AI has finished but game continues
Android lifecycle is handled (animation pauses when app backgrounded)
Desktop window is sized 900x600 with correct title
findings: All acceptance criteria met. Build, allTests, and desktopJar all pass. Initial clean build hit a stale DEX cache issue that resolved with ./gradlew clean. The lifecycle-runtime-compose dependency was added explicitly for Android lifecycle observer support. The LaunchedEffect in GameCanvas uses the isActive coroutine property (from kotlinx.coroutines) for the while loop guard, which coexists cleanly with the isActive composable parameter due to different scopes.
